settings.vpn.guide: How to connect VPN — step-by-step guide
settings.vpn.guide.amnezia.step3: In Amnezia: "Add server" → "From file" → select tubeforge-vpn.conf
settings.vpn.guide.desktop.step3: In WireGuard, click "Import Tunnel" → select the tubeforge-vpn.conf file
settings.vpn.guide.mobile.step2: Click the "Show QR Code" button above
settings.vpn.guide.mobile.step3: In the WireGuard app, tap "+" → "Scan QR code"
settings.vpn.guide.mobile.step4: Scan the QR code from your screen
settings.vpn.guide.mobile.step5: Enable the tunnel — YouTube is available! 🎉
settings.vpn.instructions: Download the config file and import it into the WireGuard app, AmneziaVPN, or any WireGuard-compatible client.
settings.vpn.preview.feature2: Access to YouTube, Google and other services
settings.vpn.preview.feature5: Compatible with WireGuard, AmneziaVPN and others
settings.vpn.preview.title: What you get with VPN
settings.vpn.proRequired: YouTube access requires a Pro or Studio plan

settings.youtubeDesc: Connected channels for publishing and analytics
